final:
module RefModule(
    input [3:0] a,
    input [3:0] b,
    input [3:0] c,
    input [3:0] d,
    input clk,
    input rst,
    output reg [7:0] out
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (rst) begin
        out <= 0;
    end else begin
        out <= a*b*c*d;
    end
end

endmodule
